# Eclectic Hive

> Full-service luxury event design, custom fabrication, and furniture rentals based in Denver, Colorado. Cinematic, art-forward environments for weddings, galas, and corporate events.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio overview and entry to the Atelier, Collection, and Gallery.
- [Atelier](/atelier): Design house and fabrication studio. Imagined. Designed. Realized.
- [Collection](/collection): Hive Signature Collection — furniture, lighting, tableware, and bespoke objects available for rental.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Selected projects and event environments.
- [Contact](/contact): Inquire about design, fabrication, production, and rentals.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
